items.name: evilsigmundblorpydoomglorpwhizzlefizzlefluff
items.description:
sigmund but the non evil counterpart: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/136669536375484

evilsigmundblorpydoomglorpwhizzlefizzlefluff or, as he likes to be called when he’s feeling extra sassy, fluffy evil ball of feathery fluff the fluffmeister. but don’t let his squishy, adorable name fool you, oh no no no, he’s the silliest and fluffiest evil being to ever glide through the fizzy stars of the universe. and yes, i said “glide,” because he doesn’t walk, he just floats around like a big, fluffy puffball of nonsensical chaos!
